COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Continued To May-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 505; Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; (D505)

Plaintiff Credit Corp. Solutions, Inc. appearing represented by Raymond A. Patenaude Esq.
Defendant Miguel Ix not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel was instructed to return at 11:00am for default hearing. Plaintiff's counsel was not available to return at that time. The matter is continued to 5/19/25 at 9:00am for Default Proove Up Hearing. Plaintiff's counsel stated he would notify Defendant of the new court date.

Matter no reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Set For Trial On May-12-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
